revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 15 Danilo content tabs (500-514, ~377 rows) consolidated into 8 production files + OpKit. Heavy deduplication (tabs 500/508, 501/509, 503/511, 505/506/514 were near-duplicates). Created influencer/creator strategy with phased build approach, UGC playbook with repurposing system, weighted vetting scorecard, IonWave-specific influencer map, contract templates, pipeline operations, database scaffold.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong actionability (4/5) — execution-ready phasing, scorecard, contracts, pipeline. Good confidence honesty (4.5/5) — liberal C/D grading on unverified data. Evidence coverage limited (3.5/5) — many data points are industry estimates. Multiple VOID dependencies on M7 Regulatory and M2 Legal.

key_blockers: M7 Regulatory: approved health claim language needed for compliance package
M2 Legal: entity name and legal review of contracts needed
Platform verification: Billo, Insense, Collabstr status needs checking
next_action: Complete M7 Regulatory to build Pre-Launch Compliance Package. Verify creator platforms are active. Begin product seeding at Month -2.
intelligence_gaps: Influencer rates in marine plasma niche (D-grade estimates)
Affiliate commission competitive analysis vs LMNT/AG1
FTC enforcement specifics for supplement influencer claims
